name: Breadcrumbs
visual_summary: Breadcrumb component, typically used to show the user's current location within a hierarchy. It's commonly used in navigation and file systems. A developer would use this component to improve user experience.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready navbar component with the following characteristics:

Name: Breadcrumbs
Description: Breadcrumb component, typically used to show the user's current location within a hierarchy. It's commonly used in navigation and file systems. A developer would use this component to improve user experience.
Style: default, minimal
Interactions: 
Tags: breadcrumbs, navigation, hierarchy

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
